stem: In the xy-plane, the graph of y = f(x) crosses the y-axis at the point (0, −4). What is the value of f(0)?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The value of f(0) is the y-coordinate of the point on the graph where x = 0. The graph crosses the y-axis at (0, −4), so f(0) = −4.

Choices B, C, and D are incorrect; they may result from sign or coordinate errors.
